nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Main user and developer documentation covering game play CLI, training pipeline, tournament, and installed commands reference.

nodes.name: PROJECT.md
nodes.summary: Top-level package map linking to per-subpackage INDEX files.

nodes.name: __main__.py
nodes.summary: Unified CLI dispatcher routing 6 sub-commands (play, dashboard, tournament, inspect, cloud, monitor) via Python 3.12 match/case.

nodes.name: state.py
nodes.summary: Defines GameState and PlayerState — the complete mutable game state with all board slots, food tokens, eggs, birdfeeder, and turn-state scratch fields.

nodes.name: schema.py
nodes.summary: Defines all bird card, bonus card, and round goal domain types including the foundational EffectKind StrEnum and its 60+ variant taxonomy.

nodes.name: decisions.py
nodes.summary: Defines all 41 Choice subclasses and 6 Decision families covering every decision point in the game, plus the ALL_DECISION_CLASSES stable encoder ordering.

nodes.name: core.py
nodes.summary: Houses the Engine class that owns the full game lifecycle — setup, turn loop, ask() for validated agent interaction, and end-game scoring.

nodes.name: actions.py
nodes.summary: Implements all main-action game state transitions: play bird, gain food, lay eggs, draw cards, and end-of-round processing.

nodes.name: scoring.py
nodes.summary: Computes final game scores (round goals, bonus cards, eggs, cached food, tuck cards, bird points) and per-choice delta values for the RL encoder.

nodes.name: grants.py
nodes.summary: The largest power handler module, implementing grant effects triggered by bird activation.

nodes.name: reactors.py
nodes.summary: Orchestrates pink (between-turn) reactive bird powers by dispatching EffectKind events.

nodes.name: layout.py
nodes.summary: Defines EncodingSpec and the full vector dimension constants for the state, choice, trunk, and setup encoders.

nodes.name: state_encode.py
nodes.summary: Implements the full game-state-to-float32-vector encoder, converting all board positions, food, birdfeeder, hand, and bonus/goal progress into a fixed-size ML input.

nodes.name: choice_encode.py
nodes.summary: Implements the fixed-size float32 vector encoder for every Choice subtype.

nodes.name: core.py
nodes.summary: Implements PolicyValueNet — the PyTorch model that takes encoded game state and choice candidates to produce policy logits and value estimates.

nodes.name: collect.py
nodes.summary: Implements single-game self-play collection, recording agent decisions and outcomes into GameRecord objects for training.

nodes.name: learner.py
nodes.summary: Implements Learner — the gradient update step for the PolicyValueNet, computing policy and value losses.

nodes.name: loop.py
nodes.summary: Houses TrainingLoop — the central RL training orchestrator that sequences self-play collection, gradient updates, checkpointing, and evaluation.

nodes.name: mp_collect.py
nodes.summary: Implements ProcessCollector — multiprocess self-play collection using Python ProcessPoolExecutor with weight broadcasting and fp16 IPC compression.

nodes.name: evaluate.py
nodes.summary: Runs evaluation games between the current model and the opponent, computing win rate and score statistics.

nodes.name: factory.py
nodes.summary: Constructs player agents from PlayerSpec configurations — wiring model weights, policy functions, and setup handlers.

nodes.name: base.py
nodes.summary: Implements the random_agent — a uniform-random choice selector conforming to the Agent protocol.

nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: Defines TrainConfig — the master training configuration descriptor with ~70 fields covering network topology, collection, evaluation, and checkpointing.

nodes.name: dashboard.py
nodes.summary: Implements the FLIGHT PLAN live training dashboard — a full-screen Rich Live display showing convergence charts, system metrics, and configuration.

nodes.name: app.py
nodes.summary: Implements the top-level tournament runner — managing player selection, game scheduling, and the live Elo dashboard.

nodes.name: runner.py
nodes.summary: Implements HeadlessRunner — the main orchestration class for a cloud training session with S3 sync and signal handling.

nodes.name: DECISIONS.md
nodes.summary: Decision/choice taxonomy, ALL_DECISION_CLASSES ordering, choice-vector stripe layout, and engine call sites.

nodes.name: TRAINING.md
nodes.summary: Training program documentation — Phase 0-3 roadmap, hyperparameter guidance, eval ladder design, and convergence criteria.

nodes.name: BIRDS.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive reference for all 180 birds and 26 bonus cards — EffectKind patterns, handler mappings.

nodes.name: architecture.py
nodes.summary: Defines ModelArchitecture — the single topology descriptor for the PolicyValueNet and the version-stamped ShapeKey.

nodes.name: version.py
nodes.summary: Defines MODEL_VERSION and the versioning contract (FRESH vs REGIME changes), exposing the version string and compat shim routing.

nodes.name: dispatcher.py
nodes.summary: Implements Instrumentation — the event dispatcher routing game lifecycle events to handlers.

nodes.name: pyproject.toml
nodes.summary: Package build configuration with strict Pyright, black, isort, coverage settings, and the wingspan CLI entry point.

nodes.name: Dockerfile
nodes.summary: Single-stage Amazon Linux 2023 container for wingspan.cloud headless training.

nodes.name: main.tf
nodes.summary: Terraform root module for AWS ECS/ECR infrastructure.

nodes.name: master.json
nodes.summary: Master bird card database — 180+ bird records.

nodes.name: VERSIONING.md
nodes.summary: Artifact version changelog and FRESH/REGIME distinction.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: AI agent guidance and architectural contract for the wingspan project.

layers.name: Game Domain
layers.description: Core Wingspan game domain types — mutable game state, all 41 decision/choice classes, and the full card schema/parse pipeline.

layers.name: Game Engine
layers.description: The Wingspan game simulation engine — Engine orchestrator, all main-action transitions, bird power handlers, reactor dispatch, scoring.

layers.name: ML Encoding & Model
layers.description: PyTorch PolicyValueNet and SetupNet neural network definitions, the full state/choice float32 vector encoders with stripe layouts, and backward-compat shims.

layers.name: RL Training Pipeline
layers.description: End-to-end RL self-play training — TrainingLoop orchestrator, self-play collection, gradient updates, evaluation ladder, checkpoint management, FLIGHT PLAN TUI, and AWS cloud runner.

layers.name: Application Layer
layers.description: Top-level application shells — CLI play command, AI agents, player factory, tournament runner with Elo, instrumentation event system, model inspection reports.

layers.name: Game Data
layers.description: Static Wingspan card database files — master bird JSON, bonus cards, goals, rules.

layers.name: Infrastructure & Config
layers.description: Project build config, AWS ECS/ECR Terraform, Dockerfile, compat test fixtures, dev scripts.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Developer workflow guide, user README, design decision records, quality gate spec.
